lines: Titus keeps one hand near the South Chain, though the links are too heavy for one person to lift.
"Show a writ if you have one. Do not make it do work it cannot."

choices.label: Ask why he guards a closed road

lines: "It permits your party through a controlled road gate. It cannot command the water court or open the north chain, and it will not move residents out of your way."
"Preceptor seals are specific because general power makes poor neighbors."

choices.label: Ask why he guards a closed road

lines: "A closed gate still needs a witness. Otherwise the first frightened crowd decides who opened it."
"I record whose hand opened it and when. I also note whether the hinge fought back."
